# Plan - 2026-06-25

Derived from `.github/research/2026-06-25-research.md`. The brief delivered
three Detailed Findings; all three were ALREADY filed as GitHub issues
(#847, #848, #849) by the same agent that wrote the spec. Two of those
issues (#847, #848) were missing the `auto-implement` label and therefore
invisible to `auto-implement.yml`. This planning run:

1. Back-filled the `auto-implement` label on #847 and #848.
2. Created three NEW issues covering work the brief flagged as follow-ups
   but did NOT file: prompt-cache observability (Actionable Recommendation
   #2), the systemic label-backfill operation (Carryover note), and the
   `src/core/messageBuilder.ts` collision risk between #812 and #848 that
   the brief did not surface.
3. Stayed within the 5-new-issue cap.

## Carryover from the research brief

| # | Title | Status | Note |
|---|-------|--------|------|
| 847 | [tools] Normalize JSON-like tool-input strings against schema | re-labelled | research Item #2 already filed; only the label was missing |
| 848 | [core] Batch outdated-read rewrites to preserve provider prefix caches | re-labelled | research Item #1 already filed; only the label was missing |
| 849 | [command] Session-wide snapshot and revert on top of file checkpoints | unchanged | research Item #3, already correctly labelled |

## Issues created (new)

| # | Title | Size | Source |
|---|-------|------|--------|
| 851 | [core] Track provider prompt-cache hit/miss tokens in stats and costTracker | small (~3h) | brief Actionable Recommendation #2 (measure cache-miss before/after) |
| 852 | [core] Define messageBuilder.ts contract to resolve #812 + #848 collision | small (~2h) | codebase audit (not in brief) |
| 853 | [ci] Backfill auto-implement label on stale enhancement issues and harden planning verify | small (~3h) | brief Carryover (queue reported empty -- it was misfiled) |

## Implementation order

#852 first (design contract, no code yet) -> #847 (already self-contained) ->
#848 (depends on #852's contract decision) -> #851 (observability for #848) ->
#849 (independent, can land anytime) -> #853 (operational, parallel with
the rest; safe to land first).

## Validation against the codebase

Every "How" section in the new issues was grounded against actual file
paths:

- `src/core/stats.ts:15-34` (SessionStats / OverallStats shape) -- target of #851.
- `src/core/costTracker.ts` -- target of #851.
- `src/providers/sapOrchestration.ts:74-80, 749, 854` -- TokenUsage and
  mapping sites used by #851.
- `src/core/agenticChat.ts:225, 241` -- already-correct call sites cited
  in #847 (no change needed).
- `src/core/compaction.ts:178` `pruneToolOutputs` -- referenced by #848,
  preserved by #852's contract.
- `src/tool/index.ts:343 zodToJsonSchema, 422 defineTool` -- schema source
  for #847.
- `.github/prompts/agent2-planning-system.md` -- target of #853's prompt
  hardening.

## Out of scope

- #772 ("Demote claude-code and aider to weekly research polling") still
  lacks `auto-implement` after 5 briefs. Listed as a candidate for #853's
  back-fill script -- not re-labelled here so the script has a real
  acceptance case.
- The 40+ other unlabelled `enhancement` issues are intentionally left
  alone in THIS run; #853 will sweep them in one transaction with full
  audit trail.

gh issue view 847 --json labels  ->  ["enhancement", "auto-implement"]
gh issue view 848 --json labels  ->  ["enhancement", "auto-implement"]

gh issue view 852 --json labels  ->  ["enhancement", "auto-implement"]
